---
title: "test"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

```{r}
load("ADNIMERGE2_unpacked/ADNIMERGE2/data/ADAS.rda")
ADAS <- ADAS
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)

# 1. Välj kolumner och ta bort dubbletter (RID + VISCODE + VISDATE)
adas_unique <- ADAS %>%
  select(RID, VISCODE, VISDATE) %>%
  distinct()  # tar bort exakta dubbletter

# 2. Räkna antal unika mätningar per individ
adas_unique <- adas_unique %>%
  group_by(RID) %>%
  mutate(n_measurements = n()) %>%
  ungroup()

# 3. Visa exempel
adas_unique %>%
  filter(RID == 1408)  # kolla just den individen
```

```{r}
num_individuals <- adas_unique %>%
  filter(n_measurements > 2) %>%
  distinct(RID) %>%
  nrow()

num_individuals
```
